skills.name: nextjs-best-practices
skills.reason: Enforces Next.js 14 App Router patterns — server vs client components, metadata API, route conventions. Prevents accidental Pages Router usage.

skills.name: shadcn-ui
skills.reason: Knows every shadcn/ui primitive, variant, and composition pattern. Prevents reinventing components that already exist in the library.

skills.name: tailwind-v4-shadcn
skills.reason: Covers Tailwind CSS utility patterns alongside shadcn. Prevents inline styles and ensures consistent use of design tokens from globals.css.

skills.name: nestjs-best-practices
skills.reason: Guards NestJS module structure, dependency injection, guard/interceptor/filter patterns. Prevents anti-patterns like circular dependencies or missing providers.

skills.name: prisma-orm
skills.reason: Knows Prisma schema syntax, migration workflow, and query API. Prevents raw SQL usage and incorrect relation definitions.

skills.name: docker-expert
skills.reason: Covers multi-stage Dockerfile patterns, compose networking, volume mounts, and health checks. Prevents broken container builds and networking issues.

skills.name: postgresql-table-design
skills.reason: Guides index strategy, constraint naming, and data type selection. Complements prisma-orm for schema design decisions.
